description: Improve the model diagnosis tool through mathematical analysis, code analysis, and research paper analysis
motivation: Pure model evaluation often lacks insights into internal representations, leading to a need for better diagnostic tools that combine mathematical rigour, code-level analysis, and literature-driven metrics.
implementation_notes: The supplementary paper (Manifold Mixup) provides a concrete method to probe hidden representations, which can be integrated into a diagnosis toolkit to assess linearity, smoothness, and generalisation of learned features.
pseudocode: 1. For a given model, extract hidden states. 2. Apply manifold mixup interpolation in multiple layers. 3. Compute metrics: linearity, confidence calibration, decision boundary smoothness. 4. Compare with baseline diagnostic outputs. 5. Use mathematical analysis to quantify improvement, code analysis to pinpoint implementation bottlenecks, and research papers to select relevant metrics.
